name: brew-tui-bar
description: Native macOS menu bar companion for BrewTUI-Bar.
author: MoLines Designs

scripts.build: xcodebuild -workspace BrewTUI-Bar.xcworkspace -scheme BrewTUI-Bar -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=macOS' CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='-' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.test: xcodebuild -workspace BrewTUI-Bar.xcworkspace -scheme BrewTUI-Bar -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=macOS' CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='-' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO test
